name: cf-domain-pp-mcp
description: Cloudflare Registrar Domains API surface as MCP tools.

cloudflare_registrar_domains_bearer_auth.title: CLOUDFLARE_REGISTRAR_DOMAINS_BEARER_AUTH
cloudflare_registrar_domains_bearer_auth.description: Sets CLOUDFLARE_REGISTRAR_DOMAINS_BEARER_AUTH for the Cloudflare Registrar Domains MCP server.

cloudflare_api_token.title: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
cloudflare_api_token.description: Cloudflare API token with Account Registrar Edit permission.

account_id.title: ACCOUNT_ID
account_id.description: Cloudflare account ID used for Registrar requests.

cloudflare_account_id.title: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
cloudflare_account_id.description: Cloudflare account ID fallback used for Registrar requests.
